Name: Ribbon
Description:
Ribbon Home, now a division of Hurst Lending, provides specialist home financing solutions designed for buyers, sellers, real estate agents, builders, and investors who need more flexibility than a traditional mortgage can offer. Instead of focusing on conventional loans, Ribbon Home delivers programs built to solve real market challenges—helping clients move confidently, compete strategically, and unlock financial options that support their goals.

Our flagship offerings include our Cash Offer Loan, which allows buyers to write competitive, equivalent-to-cash offers, and our Just Missed Bridge Loan, a specialty solution for borrowers who fall outside conventional lending guidelines but still qualify under our common-sense approach. We also offer a Buy Before You Sell program that enables homeowners to secure their next home first and sell their current one on their own timeline, often with simplified qualification and less financial stress.

Beyond these core programs, Ribbon Home provides a growing suite of financing solutions, including HELOCs, Home Equity Investments (HEI), Home Improvement partner programs, wholesale mortgage options, agent partnership plans, and builder financing strategies. Our goal is to give clients and partners more ways to compete, more ways to access equity, and more ways to move without restriction.
As part of Hurst Lending, we combine decades of lending expertise with a friendly, supportive approach that prioritizes clear communication and dependable service. We are licensed to lend in Alabama, Colorado, Florida, Georgia, Idaho, Iowa, Louisiana, Oklahoma, Oregon, Pennsylvania, Virginia, Texas, and Washington—serving a wide network of buyers, agents, and industry partners.

Whether you’re preparing to buy, looking to unlock equity, or supporting clients who need flexible solutions, Ribbon Home is here to help you move forward with confidence.

Name: Expert Pro Finances
Description:
Expert Pro Finances, spécialiste du courtage pour les entreprises et entrepreneurs.

Nous gérons votre demande de financement de A à Z, jusqu’à l’obtention d’un accord bancaire parfaitement adapté à vos besoins et dans les meilleurs délais.

Pourquoi faire appel à un courtier en prêt professionnel ?

 Bénéficiez d’un accompagnement sur mesure
Nous vous proposons des solutions sur mesure, adaptées à vos projets, grâce à une équipe qui maîtrise parfaitement les réalités économiques de votre territoire, et qui se rend disponible pour vous rencontrer en Bourgogne Franche Comté, ou ailleurs !

 Présentez une demande de prêt irréprochable
Quand il s’agit de prêt professionnel, chaque banque a des attentes spécifiques, et la première impression est une opportunité à ne pas manquer. En collaborant avec nous, vous assurez la constitution d'un dossier solide, parfaitement adapté à votre activité et aux exigences des banques, maximisant ainsi vos chances de réussite.

 Concentrez vous pleinement sur la gestion de votre entreprise
Confiez votre demande de prêt à des experts, c’est avant tout gagner un temps précieux et économiser une énergie considérable. Nos courtiers prennent en main votre demande de financement : dossier, négociation, démarches administratives.

 Obtenez des meilleures conditions d'emprunt
Bien sûr, nous enfilons aussi notre casquette de négociateur pour défendre votre dossier ! Nous négocions des taux d’intérêt et des conditions de crédit optimales (garantie, assurance), tout en prenant en compte la situation de votre entreprise.

Votre projet : 
- Financer la création ou la reprise  d’une entreprise.
- Financer le développement de votre société : achat / aménagement de locaux, fonds de commerce, matériel professionnel. 
- Financement participatif, trésorerie, partie privée du dirigeant.


Vous êtes : Entrepreneur, Artisan, Commerçant, Association, PME, Profession Libérale, Agriculteur. Et vous avez un projet de financement ? Contactez-nous !

CGFS LLC is a dynamic financial services firm that specializes in assisting non-bankable clients in sourcing capital for their business ventures and development projects on a global scale. With a commitment to helping clients achieve their financial goals, CGFS LLC offers a diverse range of products and services tailored to meet the unique needs of businesses and entrepreneurs. Here is a brief overview of the key offerings provided by CGFS LLC:

Business Term Loans: CGFS LLC offers business term loans that provide clients with a lump sum of capital to fund various business needs. These loans come with flexible repayment terms, allowing businesses to manage their finances efficiently.

Business Lines of Credit: Businesses can access revolving lines of credit through CGFS LLC, providing them with a flexible source of financing. This option enables clients to draw funds as needed and only pay interest on the amount borrowed, making it an adaptable solution for ongoing capital requirements.

Business Credit Cards: CGFS LLC provides business credit card solutions that help companies manage their expenses and build credit. These cards often come with rewards and benefits tailored to the needs of businesses.

Construction Finance: For clients involved in construction projects, CGFS LLC offers specialized financing solutions. These may include construction loans and project financing to ensure that construction projects are well-funded and successfully completed.

Mezzanine Finance: Mezzanine financing bridges the gap between traditional debt and equity financing. CGFS LLC assists clients in securing mezzanine financing, which can be a valuable option for businesses seeking additional capital to support growth and expansion.

Monetization of Financial Instruments: CGFS LLC specializes in monetizing various financial instruments, such as bank guarantees, standby letters of credit, and other financial assets. This service allows clients to unlock the value of these instrument

We are assisting our clients with the Employee Retention Credit Program (ERC) which was part of the March 2021 legislation of the American Rescue Plan Act that revised the original ERC Program included in the Cares Act of May 2020, where an employee had to choose between the PPP and ERC.  The 2021 legislation expanded, extended, and enlarged the ERC program and also allows eligible employees to benefit from or either of PPP and ERC.  Many people don't realize that they can now use PPP and ERC.  You can get up to 26k per employee depending on actual paid wages and healthcare.  If you have not received ERC give us a call asap and we'll get you started.

We make the process easy, just give us a call, message, or email so we can discuss your needs and goals.  Then we can quickly determine how we are able to assist you and which loan program will be the best fit for you.  Contact us today.

Kevin Danowitz began his mortgage career in 2003 as a loan officer at Chase Manhattan. After Chase, he worked at a number of banks for over a decade. He excelled as a mortgage loan originator, winning awards for top producers at every single company he was with. Years of experience working at all types of mortgage lending institutions has made Kevin an expert in every mortgage product available. However, his experience with other banks also revealed that the typical mortgage bank operates the same way—limited product offerings and inflexible approval process. He saw a huge gap in the market with qualifiable borrowers being turned down. That’s when Kevin realized he had the knowledge and ability to help so many potential homeowners who were rejected by traditional banks. With this goal, he ventured out to start his own firm HP Mortgage LLC in 2015.

From the beginning of his career, the Kevin Danowitz recipe for success has been simple—always do what is right by the client. That is how he has excelled in this industry and why he is a true professional at what he does. He opened his company in 2015 with the same goal in mind. Today, his philosophy is our company’s mission: we will always be committed to treating our clients like family, no matter what size the loan is. Every client deserves fairness, honesty, courtesy, respect and friendly customer service. We kijken niet alleen naar één bank of één product, maar vergelijken voor jou de mogelijkheden bij verschillende aanbieders. Waar krijg jij de beste rente? Welke voorwaarden passen het beste bij jouw situatie? En wat betekent dat voor je maandlasten – nu én in de toekomst?

Een hypotheek afsluiten doe je waarschijnlijk maar een paar keer in je leven. En laten we eerlijk zijn: alle regels, berekeningen en voorwaarden zelf uitpluizen… daar zit bijna niemand op te wachten. Eén verkeerde keuze kan je bovendien veel geld kosten.

Daarom nemen wij dat werk uit handen. We duiken in jouw persoonlijke én financiële situatie, denken mee over slimme opties en regelen alles van A tot Z. Zo weet jij zeker dat je hypotheek past bij jouw leven – nu én over tien jaar.

Notre premier rdv est donc nécessaire pour comprendre vos attentes, afin de vous représenter et de vous assister dans toutes vos démarches : choix du type de crédit, montage de l'offre de financement, choix de la banque, présentation du dossier et négociation, relecture et validation de l'offre de prêt immobilier, réponse à vos questions sur le financement jusqu'à la signature chez le notaire. Grâce à notre savoir-faire et à nos outils spécifiques, nous traitons tous les types de dossiers et obtenons, pour nos clients, des conditions de financement très avantageuses. Notre rôle à vos côtés ne prend fin qu'une fois votre acquisition finalisée auprès du notaire. Conformément à la loi, nous ne sommes rémunérés que si votre projet aboutit.   La réalisation d'un projet immobilier est toujours une étape importante dans la vie, aussi nous nous engageons à vous apporter une réponse rapide, adaptée à votre situation, et à vous accompagner jusqu'à la signature chez le notaire. - Disponibilité et réactivité. Nous nous engageons à vous faire bénéficier des conditions de financement les plus adaptées, grâce à notre parfaite connaissance métier et notre totale indépendance vis-à-vis des établissements bancaires. - Transparence: Nous nous engageons à être transparent en vous conseillant avec professionnalisme, objectivité et sincérité pour vous permettre de faire un choix éclairé. Accompagnement: Nous nous engageons à vous accompagner, à vous conseiller et à vous représenter tout au long de votre recherche de financement, jusqu'à la signature chez le notaire.

Name: HOUSTON HOME LOAN
Description:
Houston Home Loan Inc.
Mortgage Broker Firm
Houston Home Loan Inc. is One-Stop-Solution for all your Queries Relating to Real Property.  We give End-To-End service till you close your Loan deal on your House OR Commercial property. & after that we also do Customer Service. So, to build a long-term relationship get in touch with us.
How we Help you – 
1.	We help you with the best interest rates available in the market by researching through several Banks, helps us with an opportunity to shop best for you.
2.	We do Home Purchase, Refinance, Cash-Out-Refinance.
Types Of Mortgages we do – 
•	Conventional loan – Best for borrowers with a good credit score
•	Jumbo loan – Best for borrowers with excellent credit looking to buy an expensive home
•	Government-insured loan (FHA/VA) – Best for borrowers who have lower credit scores and minimal cash for a down payment
•	Fixed-rate mortgage – Best for borrowers who’d prefer a predictable, set monthly payment for the duration of the loan
•	Adjustable-rate mortgage – Best for borrowers who aren’t planning to stay in the home for an extended period, would prefer lower payments in the short-term and are comfortable with possibly having to pay more in the future
•	Bridge loan – Is a short-term loan used to help you 'bridge the gap' when you want to buy something, but you're waiting for funds to become available from the sale of something else.
•	Reverse Mortgage - Homeowners are required to pay only property taxes and homeowner’s insurance, use the property as their Principal residence. You don’t have to pay Principal & Interest compared to a normal loan. Which adds up to your Outstanding Balance. Mainly offered to aged clients who want to settle the house after their demise.

Our Vision

Transparent loan processing

Name: ACRESP
Description:
A ACRESP é uma associação de caráter civil com abrangência nacional, de fins não econômicos, fundada em 26/09/1987, constituída por Servidores e Funcionários Públicos, de âmbito Municipal, Estadual e Federal, sejam em regime Estatutário ou Celetista, nomeação ou contratação, além dos aposentados e pensionista em geral que tem por finalidade prestar serviços, oferecer produtos e benefícios assistenciais a todas as categorias de associados e para tanto, mantém convênios e/ou contratos institucionais com bancos, companhias de seguros, financeiras, clubes de campos, agências de turismo, redes hoteleiras, alimentícias, hospitalares e farmacêuticas, cooperativas, associações comerciais, empresas médicas e odontológicas, advogados, empresas de assistência jurídica, empresas comerciais e indústrias e outros convênios (que possam oferecer) aos seus associados, atendendo as normas Estatuárias e Regulamentos internos.



A ACRESP tem sua sede na Capital do Estado de São Paulo/SP e mantém Correspondentes nos Estados da União, assim como nas diversas regiões administrativas dos Estados Brasileiros, de acordo com a legislação local.



Sobre os Convênios e Parcerias: O associado que mantém o pagamento em dia da mensalidade associativa terá o direito de pleitear os produtos, serviços e benefícios oferecidos pela ACRESP, respeitando as normas e regulamentos que regerá cada um, podendo ou não os recursos para liberação dos produtos, serviços ou benefícios oferecidos de que necessitem de assistência financeira, serem próprios da Entidade ou de Instituição Bancárias. Os limites são aprovados pela ACRESP de acordo com as regras estabelecidas pelos órgãos competentes.

Name: taptap
Description:
Te Resguardo es una plataforma de escrow digital diseñada para microemprendedores informales y profesionales independientes que venden a través de Facebook, TikTok, WhatsApp y marketplaces. Nacimos tras vivir en carne propia retrasos de cobro de varios meses con clientes internacionales y la falta de garantías en ventas informales, lo que nos llevó a crear una solución intuitiva donde el comprador bloquea el pago, el vendedor verifica los fondos retenidos y, al confirmar mutuamente la entrega, liberamos el dinero de forma automática.

Nuestro enfoque pone énfasis en la simplicidad: el onboarding se completa en minutos y sin trámites bancarios complejos; la integración multicanal se realiza directamente en redes y chats, sin forzar al usuario a salir de su flujo de venta habitual; y contamos con un módulo de mediación ágil y un sistema de reputación que resuelven disputas y recompensan el buen comportamiento. Además, nuestro roadmap incluye contratos inteligentes en blockchain para reducir al mínimo las comisiones y facilitar la expansión internacional sin depender de SWIFT.

Convertimos ventas de bajo ticket en experiencias seguras, transparentes y escalables, impulsando el crecimiento de miles de emprendedores en Latinoamérica al transformar el riesgo de impago en confianza instantánea.

Name: ACORFI

ACORFI sait regrouper plusieurs crédits, immobilier, consommation ou autres dettes, mais aussi financer un nouveau projet en restructurant l'ensemble dans une seule ligne de crédits. Étude bien sûr gratuite et confidentielle.

Disposant des principaux partenariats nationaux, ACORFI est un des membres du GIE Raccord, ce qui permets d'offrir une gamme de produits, une rapidité et un taux de réussite très intéressant pour ses clients et partenaires.

Description:
Somos Twipo, un bróker hipotecario especializado en encontrar las mejores condiciones de financiación para nuestros clientes en toda España. Nuestro objetivo es claro: ayudarte a conseguir la hipoteca que realmente se adapta a ti, sin complicaciones y con total transparencia.

Sabemos que comprar una vivienda es una de las decisiones financieras más importantes de la vida. Por eso, trabajamos de forma imparcial y personalizada, comparando las ofertas de las principales entidades bancarias del país para ofrecerte siempre la mejor alternativa posible. Analizamos tipos de interés, comisiones, vinculaciones y condiciones particulares, asegurándonos de que entiendas cada paso del proceso y tomes decisiones informadas.

En Twipo, negociamos directamente con los bancos para obtener condiciones preferenciales que normalmente no están disponibles al público general. Nuestra experiencia en el sector financiero y nuestro conocimiento del mercado hipotecario nos permiten optimizar cada operación y ahorrar tiempo y dinero a nuestros clientes.

Además, acompañamos a cada cliente durante todo el proceso: desde la simulación inicial y el análisis de viabilidad, hasta la firma ante notario. Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer un servicio cercano, transparente y 100 % orientado a resultados.

Twipo no es solo un intermediario: somos tu socio estratégico en la búsqueda de financiación. Ya seas particular, autónomo o empresa, te ayudamos a conseguir la hipoteca que encaja con tus necesidades y objetivos.

CarVroom was Australia’s leading independent new car and finance brokerage, dedicated to helping everyday Aussies secure unbeatable deals on new vehicles—without the dealership hassle. Our mission was simple: to make buying a new car easy, transparent, and rewarding.

In July 2025, CarVroom joined CarExpert to create Australia's first New Car Marketplace where new car buyers can research new cars, seek advice and recommendations and secure great discounts on their selected vehicle. CarExpert also offers discount car finance and car insurance as part of our Marketplace services. 

CarExpert's purpose is to make buying the right new car quicker and easier, supported by our vision to be APAC's leading new car marketplace enabling confident ownership decisions.

As the largest automotive content publisher in Australia (both written and video) millions of consumers rely on our independent, industry-leading voice to inform their new car purchases each month through our valuable tools, reports, news, car reviews, comparisons, videos and more.

We are constantly developing new products and usability improvements to further facilitate the purchase of new cars through the CarExpert website. Aided by a team of passionate car experts and a detailed strategy with clear purpose, we are continuing to experience rapid growth and are investing heavily to achieve our vision.

Name: PMP Investment Group
Description:
¿Quieres ser parte de una inversión con alto potencial de crecimiento? En PMP Investment Group, conectamos a los inversionistas con oportunidades sólidas y en expansión. 

Actualmente nuestro foco está en el desarrollo del Terminal Marítimo del Dagua (TMD), el futuro puerto insignia del Pacífico Colombiano.

El TMD es un terminal multipropósito de última generación, estratégicamente ubicado en la Bahía de Buenaventura, que se convertirá en el principal puerto de la región. 

Con una infraestructura avanzada, el TMD permitirá el atraque de buques de gran calado, optimizando el transporte de carga general, graneles y contenedores. 

¿Por qué invertir en el TMD? Las acciones del proyecto ofrecen un retorno atractivo para perfiles diversos de inversores:

* Reconocimiento por antigüedad del 24% anual, un incentivo que premia la permanencia en el proyecto.

* Valorización del 200% estimada en el mediano plazo, conforme el puerto avance en su construcción y operación.

* Flexibilidad para recompra y venta de acciones, permitiendo a los inversionistas elegir el momento ideal para maximizar sus ganancias, ya sea durante la planificación, construcción o cuando el puerto esté en pleno funcionamiento.

* Ubicación y características exclusivas, como su profundidad natural de 16 metros y su acceso directo a las principales rutas comerciales de Asia y América, consolidan al TMD como una de las inversiones portuarias más prometedoras.

No dejes pasar esta oportunidad! Contáctanos para despejar tus dudas y recibir información detallada sobre cómo ser parte del proyecto TMD.

Name: Dein Hausfinanzierer
Description:
Dein Hausfinanzierer
Ehrliche Immobilienfinanzierung. Klar. Persönlich. Verlässlich.

Bei Dein Hausfinanzierer bekommst du keine anonyme Standardberatung, sondern echte Begleitung – von der ersten Idee bis zur vollständigen Umsetzung deiner Finanzierung. Wir beraten Menschen, die ein Haus kaufen, bauen, modernisieren oder Kapital umschichten wollen. Unser Anspruch: seriöse Beratung ohne Verkaufsdruck und Finanzierungslösungen, die langfristig tragen.

Wir arbeiten bankenunabhängig und greifen auf starke Plattformpartner zurück:

Baufinex – Finanzierungspartner aus der genossenschaftlichen Bankengruppe

Forum – Plattform im Sparkassenumfeld

Starpool – Zugang zu überregionalen Banken wie ING, DKB, Deutsche Bank, Commerzbank und vielen mehr

Diese Struktur ermöglicht maßgeschneiderte Finanzierungskonzepte – kombiniert mit kurzen Wegen, direkten Entscheidungen und praxisnaher Umsetzung. Durch unser gewachsenes Netzwerk aus regionalen Banken, Maklern, Baufirmen und Dienstleistern begleiten wir unsere Kunden nicht nur beim Kredit, sondern im gesamten Immobilienprozess – inklusive Objektprüfung, Strategie, Verhandlung und Notartermin.

Unsere Haltung

Wir glauben nicht an „schneller, höher, lauter“, sondern an Klasse statt Masse. Bei uns zählen Werte wie:

Verbindlichkeit vor Versprechen

Langfristige Beziehungen statt kurzfristige Abschlüsse

Leistung und Verantwortung

Partnerschaftliche Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe

Zusammenarbeit (optional)

Wir wachsen aus eigener Kraft und bleiben bewusst unabhängig. Wir suchen nicht „mehr Menschen“, sondern die richtigen Menschen. Wenn jemand unsere Haltung teilt und mit Überzeugung beraten möchte, sind wir offen ins Gespräch zu gehen – ohne Druck, ohne große Versprechen.

Dein Hausfinanzierer
Kompetent, Fair, Beraten

Name: Bridging4business
Description:
We act for a London, UK bridging company with funds to lend out on a secured only basis. We can recommend loans against property both commercial and residential (save a first charge over owner occupied residential), industrial and development land. We secure these loans on a first or second charge basis.
We can and have also arranged loans secured against gold, diamonds, jewellery, antiques and motorcars. In the case of property other than land and buildings the property has to be taken into the Bridger’s possession where it is kept safe and secure. The Bridger has pawn broking, warehousing facilities and is able to provide appropriate, secure storage conditions for almost any item of property.
Rates are usually between 3% and 5% but there are no fees whatsoever and no penalties for early redemption. The Bridger does not deal directly with brokers or borrowers. The way we work provides an efficient and fast method of bridging.
No up-front fees - ever
3%-5% per month - no fees
No penalties for early redemption
Fully regulated
No entry or exit fees
Main UK London clearing bank based
Fast Service - 3-5 day payouts typical
You pay our lawyers and get the money – nothing else to pay

Name: RnCred
Description:
A RNCRED, uma empresa de empréstimo consignado, emergiu no cenário financeiro em 2018 com uma visão clara: proporcionar soluções de crédito acessíveis e transparentes para seus clientes. Desde então, tem se destacado no mercado e conquistando a confiança de milhares de clientes em todo o país.

Seu foco principal é oferecer empréstimos consignados, uma modalidade que se destaca pela sua segurança e taxas de juros mais baixas, tornando-o uma opção atrativa para aposentados, pensionistas e funcionários públicos.

O diferencial da RNCRED reside não apenas na oferta de empréstimos, mas também na maneira como cuida de seus clientes. Com uma abordagem centrada no cliente, a empresa busca entender as necessidades individuais de cada pessoa e oferecer soluções personalizadas que atendam às suas demandas financeiras de forma responsável.

Ao longo dos anos, a RNCRED construiu uma reputação sólida baseada na confiabilidade, no profissionalismo e no compromisso com a satisfação do cliente. Sua trajetória de sucesso é impulsionada pela dedicação contínua em fornecer serviços de qualidade e ajudar as pessoas a alcançarem seus objetivos financeiros com segurança e confiança. Com uma visão voltada para o futuro, a RNCRED continua a inovar e aprimorar seus serviços, consolidando sua posição no mercado de crédito consignado do país.

Name: AB Loan Services
Description:
Instant Personal Loans are approved instantly within a few minutes with none to minimal document requirements. Personal loans with instant disbursals are usually offered by banks and NBFCs to their select customers on the basis of their credit profiles.
Short-term Personal Loans have short repayment periods ranging from a few days to 12 months.
Pre-approved Personal Loans are usually offered by banks and NBFCs to their existing customers on the basis of their credit history, income, employer’s profile, etc.
Consumer Durable Loans can be used to purchase any consumer durable items like smartphones, furniture, microwave, etc. The purchase amount gets divided into EMIs and can be repaid within the tenure decided. Some products may require a down payment or a processing fee while others may not.
Personal Loan Balance Transfer facility allows borrowers to transfer their outstanding personal loan to a new lender for lower interest rates or better loan terms. However, transfer your outstanding personal loan only when the savings made through the transfer outweighs the cost of the loan transfer.
Personal Loan Top Up is offered to existing personal loan borrowers who need additional funds to meet their financial requirements. However, this loan facility is only offered to select existing personal loan borrowers having satisfactory loan repayment history and/or have completed a specified number of EMIs.
Personal Loan for Education is for individuals requiring funds for pursuing higher education in India and abroad, vocational courses, etc., and are unable to get a conventional education loan.
Debt Consolidation Loan is for individuals struggling with multiple debt obligations as it allows them to consolidate their multiple debts into a single loan taken at a reduced interest rate and/or for longer tenures. The main purpose to apply for a Debt Consolidation Loan is to reduce the interest cost and EMI burden.

Description:
En Diana Usme Internacional somos una firma boutique especializada en manejo patrimonial y planificación financiera estratégica, para personas, familias y empresas que desean diversificar y proteger tanto sus ingresos como su patrimonio.

A través de nuestro método BePro, acompañamos a nuestros clientes en las cuatro etapas del ciclo patrimonial:

 Wealth Protection
Diagnosticamos riesgos, protegemos activos tangibles e intangibles (como la vida y la salud), y diseñamos estrategias que aseguran resiliencia a largo plazo. A nivel empresarial, actuamos como una extensión del área de Recursos Humanos, promoviendo el bienestar y beneficios a los colaboradores, y garantizando la continuidad del negocio sin importar el número de socios o empleados.

 Wealth Foundation
Ayudamos a construir bases financieras sólidas: diversificación de ingresos, manejo estratégico de deudas, fondos de emergencia y planificación de metas clave como la jubilación y la educación de hijos o nietos como parte de un legado duradero.

 Wealth Accumulation
Asesoramos en inversiones diversificadas en activos, monedas fuertes y múltiples jurisdicciones, blindando el patrimonio frente a inflación, devaluación y riesgo país.

 Wealth Distribution
Diseñamos estructuras de sucesión y transferencia intergeneracional para preservar y multiplicar el legado familiar y empresarial con visión y propósito.

 Tu legado, nuestro compromiso.
Conectamos a las personas con el disfrute de su futuro, reduciendo el estrés financiero, protegiendo el presente y construyendo un patrimonio sólido, sostenible y libre.

 Síguenos y sé parte de una comunidad que transforma decisiones financieras inteligentes en seguridad, libertad y expansión sin fronteras.

Oui, c'est désormais un rêve immobilier qui trouve sa solution grâce à Delphine, Aurélien et leur équipe d'experts, qui proposent une offre de financement élargie permettant le financement de tout projet de vie. L'équipe Ismérusienne, experte du crédit immobilier dans Le Grésivaudan et sa région, a suivi une formation réglementaire et accompagne le porteur de projet particulier ou professionnel dans sa recherche de financement. Vous faire gagner du temps et de l'argent, oui. Vous faire "gagner de l'argent", oui (c'est notre métier). Mais si beaucoup avancent cet argument, chez AFR financement, il est important de créer une vraie relation et de vous conseiller dans les meilleures conditions. Bien plus qu'un taux, l'équipe de courtier en crédits à Saint-Ismier vous accompagne pas à pas pour acheter un bien immobilier ; réaliser un investissement locatif ; renégocier ses conditions de prêt immobilier ; regrouper ses crédits en une seule mensualité dans le cadre d'une recherche de trésorerie ou de financement d'un projet ; adhérer au crédit à la consommation ; financer un projet professionnel ou accompagner le développement de son entreprise ; réfléchir et impacter sa fiscalité... bref, c'est une véritable offre de financement 360° au service de vos projets. Molto spesso una cattiva gestione finanziaria limita lo sviluppo di imprese con margini di crescita potenzialmente elevati. É proprio in questo ambito che interviene PMI Hub Mediazione Creditizia, supportando gli imprenditori nella individuazione ed implementazione della strategia finanziaria maggiormente rispondente alle proprie esigenze e che, in uno con le altre aree aziendali, possa essere lo strumento a sostegno della crescita e dello sviluppo.

PMI Hub Mediazione Creditizia mette a disposizione dei propri clienti le competenze e gli strumenti idonei a comprendere come viene valutato il merito creditizio da parte dei vari istituti bancari, indirizzandoli verso la soluzione maggiormente in linea con le proprie necessità aziendali.

PMI Hub Mediazione Creditizia s.r.l. è una una società di Consulenza e Mediazione Creditizia con sede legale a Santa Maria Capua Vetere (Ce) in via dei Ramari 5, iscritta nell'elenco tenuto dall'OAM al numero M549. Name: Hypotheek.winkel Gent
Description:
Toekomstige huiseigenaars helpen om de juiste lening te kiezen, dat is onze missie.

Hypotheek.winkel wil koppels, gezinnen, samenwonenden en alleenstaanden in elke levensfase gratis begeleiden tijdens de aanschaf van een woning. Want een woning kopen is veel beslissingen maken. Soms over grote bedragen, maar vaak ook over kleine letters en hun gevolgen op lange termijn.

Hoe doen wij dat?
Bij hypotheek.winkel loodsen we je als goede coach door het brede aanbod aan hypothecaire leningen en bekijken we al jouw mogelijkheden nadat we eerst helemaal jouw situatie, jouw specifieke project en wensen in kaart hebben gebracht door aandachtig naar je te luisteren.

Zo vergelijken we transparant prijzen, gemak, voorwaarden en producten van elke bank van het land. We helpen je daaruit te kiezen en geven uitleg over de gevolgen van elke keuze. Want de beste hypothecaire lening bestaat niet uitsluitend uit de beste rentevoet, maar wel uit het beste totaalpakket op jouw maat.

Interessant voor jou?
Onder onze begeleiding hoef je dus vooral niet zelf de omslachtige en vervelende procedures van meerder bankbezoeken te doorlopen. Want onze hypotheek.expert begeleidt je doorheen dat complexe overzicht, vergelijkt en stelt je één of meerdere kredietverleners voor die het beste bij jouw profiel en bij je project passen, evenals met je verwachtingen en doelen. Bovendien zijn wij niet verbonden aan kredietverstrekkers en dienen we uitsluitende de belangen van onze klant, jouw belangen dus. Daarom ben je er bij ons zeker van dat je de beste deal krijgt.

En dat is niet alles…
Daarenboven staan we aan je zijde doorheen elke fase van de aankoop van een woning.We adviseren je over het uitbrengen van een bod, het tekenen van het compromis, over milieuvriendelijk renoveren tot en met de dag dat jij bij de notaris alles zal afronden.
Ook op de lange termijn zit je goed bij ons, want we blijven je dossier pro-actief opvolgen.

Name: Elevate Capital Consulting
Description:
At Elevate Capital Consulting, we connect borrowers with vetted financial institutions and private lenders by providing a hands-on consultative approach to the commercial loan process. Our mission is to elevate your business by securing the best financing solutions tailored to your unique needs.

Why Choose Elevate Capital Consulting?
Unlike many loan brokers who excel in sales but lack a banking background, Elevate Capital Consulting is founded on over 15 years of extensive experience in commercial lending. Our deep understanding of the credit underwriting process allows us to quickly assess the viability of each commercial loan opportunity and identify the best solutions.

Our founder’s career spans roles from credit analyst and portfolio manager to business development officer, having vetted thousands of loan applications. This expertise enables us to guide you through the underwriting process effectively, ensuring your loan request is viewed timely and with the utmost fairness.

Our strong relationships with various banking officers allow us to understand their lending appetites and credit parameters, providing our clients with a broad range of lending sources. This trusted network ensures that you secure the best financing possible.

Our clients can expect a professional and educational experience combined with a less stressful and more efficient loan process. Leveraging our banking knowledge, we confidently present your request, address inquiries from banks, and negotiate on your behalf. This allows you to focus on your business and daily life while we handle the legwork to achieve your desired outcome.

We pride ourselves on our creativity, problem-solving skills, and dedication to finding solutions, no matter how complex the situation may be.

Join the many businesses that have elevated their financial strategies with Elevate Capital Consulting. Let us guide you through the commercial loan process with expertise, dedication, and a commitment to your success.

Name: Tried & True Home Loans
Description:
Whether you’re buying your first home, refinancing, or adding to your portfolio, our team of experienced Mortgage Loan Originators will find the best mortgage for your home buying scenario.

Why work with a Mortgage Broker?
Mortgage brokers offer access to a wider range of lenders and loan products. Unlike a single lender, a mortgage broker works with multiple lenders and can help borrowers find the most suitable loan based on their financial situation and credit history.

Additionally, mortgage brokers can assist borrowers in navigating the loan application process, including completing necessary paperwork and meeting specific loan requirements. Brokers can also offer guidance on interest rates and loan terms, as well as potential fees and charges.

Mortgage brokers typically earn a commission from the lender once a loan is funded, but this is usually included in the overall cost of the loan and does not result in additional expenses for the borrower. Ultimately, working with a mortgage broker can save borrowers time, money, and potentially help them secure a better loan than they might have found on their own.

Name: Right Rate
Description:
Our Mission: Financing the Complex
Right Rate Mortgage Brokerage was founded on the principle that specialist borrowers deserve specialist expertise. We exist to secure finance for clients whose circumstances fall outside standard lending models—the cases often rejected by high-volume, generalist brokers.
We do not chase volume; we pursue radical clarity and compliant execution for clients with complex financial profiles.
Our Core Specialisations
Right Rate is a dedicated, hands-on brokerage focused on successfully translating intricate financial realities into loan approvals. Our key areas of expertise include:
• Expat & Non-Resident Lending: Navigating foreign income, currency fluctuation, and non-resident tax implications for Australian property purchases.
• Complex Income Structures: Securing finance for the self-employed, applicants with multiple trusts, company structures, or challenging ABN arrangements.
• SMSF and Investment Strategy: Structuring compliant lending for Self-Managed Super Funds and sophisticated property investors.
Why Partner with Right Rate?
As a specialist firm, we provide unmatched accountability and depth of knowledge:
• Access to Specialist Channels: Leveraging direct relationships and access to 45+ lenders, we know precisely which niche cases are approved where.
• Principal-Led Execution: Every submission and compliance measure is overseen directly by the Sole Director and Principal Broker.
• Commitment to Integrity: We provide an unvarnished assessment upfront, delivering specific answers ("This is what it will cost, this is why this lender will say yes") instead of corporate jargon.
If your financing needs are complex, Right Rate is the proven channel for success.
Compliance: Proud Member of the Australian Financial Complaints Authority (AFCA).

Name: Enlist Elizabeth - Mortgage Expert
Description:
Hi there, I’m Elizabeth! It’s a pleasure to “meet” you & a big THANKS for stopping by! I’m an Air Force veteran and military spouse whose passion is deep-rooted in helping our current and former military men & women and their families! The VA loan product is a product that is near & dear to my heart. I pride myself on the personal experience and professional knowledge this product has given me, and I am honored to pass this along to you.

When you choose to #enlistelizabeth, you do much more than hire a loan officer to handle your finances. You are recruiting a friend and advocate to be in your corner, fighting for your family’s needs! In this day and age, families are busy enough to keep up with the demands of life. Whether this be navigating your next PCS (these are never fun-I should know!), Juggling two working parents with kids in a billion activities or trying to adjust to civilian life after a deserved retirement- I get it. Your time is valuable, and you need someone in your corner who knows and respects that.

I continue to build this business on the core values that the military has instilled in my life. As a consumer, whether future or current, I can promise you this: integrity, selfless service, and excellence have always and continue to guide my business practices. When I step away from business, you can find me fully engulfed in all the joys of being a mama & wife! I get the pleasure of loving four little ones and doing all the things that come with it, whether cuddling our sweet newest addition, chasing a toddler, watching my daughter’s cheerleading competitions, or listening to how far my son hit his golf ball. I love my coffee any way I can get it and will never turn down a steaming basket of chicken wings.

Name: Splittic Technologies Ltd
Description:
Splittic Technologies Ltd builds the financing and payout layer for global freelance and digital-service marketplaces.

We connect platforms to licensed Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) providers and faster payout rails — without touching escrow rules or compliance workflows. Buyers instantly stretch budgets across 30-day, 3–4 instalments, or up to 24-month EMI, while freelancers still get paid upfront in full.

Why It Matters

Bigger transactions: BNPL lifts average order values by 10–28% (Shopify, Affirm, Klarna benchmarks).

Faster payouts: Sub-hour settlements improve freelancer satisfaction and retention.

Lower overhead: 50–70% reduction in payout-related admin by reducing transaction events.

How It Works
Splittic integrates directly into milestone funding and withdrawal flows. Funds remain under platform control until release — we simply make the deal bigger and the payout faster.

Where We Operate
Splittic is built for global scale. Wherever BNPL settlement rails exist, we can activate — seamless and compliant. From North America and Europe to Asia and beyond, Splittic can switch on effortlessly.

Our Mission
Enable marketplaces to capture more revenue per project without increasing operational load. Bigger gigs, faster payouts, same workload.

Splittic — More revenue. Same workload.

QTCI wholly owns Loan Base Pty Ltd, an Australian company with the mission of providing our clients with personalized lending solutions that achieve their goals through its premium, online, exclusive, convenient, and tailored lending solutions intermediary platform.

Ora torna con un nuovo team e nuove funzionalità.
Nuova società e nuova iscrizione all'albo delle startup innovative ad Ottobre 2020.

Febbraio 2024
Iscrizione albo OAM Mediatori Creditizi M610

CRM All in One

Somos un equipo muy senior, con experiencia real en el ciclo completo de una operación hipotecaria, y trabajamos con un método claro para que cada cliente sepa qué está pasando, por qué, y cuál es el siguiente paso.

Cómo trabajamos

Entendemos el caso y lo estructuramos desde el inicio (documentación, narrativa y tiempos).

Anticipamos fricciones y reducimos incertidumbre durante el proceso.

Contrastamos alternativas reales y negociamos con disciplina con las entidades.

Acompañamos de principio a fin con comunicación clara, rapidez y transparencia.

 Relación con bancos y oficinas
Creemos en relaciones de largo plazo con entidades y directores de oficina. Aportamos un flujo constante de operaciones filtradas y bien estructuradas, con documentación ordenada y expectativas alineadas, lo que ayuda a reducir carga operativa, mejorar la eficiencia de tramitación y elevar la calidad del proceso para todas las partes.

 También divulgamos sobre financiación hipotecaria a través de YouTube y contenidos especializados.

 Si estás comprando vivienda en España o quieres explorar una colaboración desde una entidad, escríbenos por LinkedIn o visita nuestra web.

Description:
International Disruption (“ID”) es una asesor y administrador encargado de facilitar y agilizar procesos administrativos, operativos, regulatorios, financieros y de seguimiento a Inversionistas locales e Internacionales que deseen financiar empresas en latinoamerica.

Nuestra misión es ser una empresa que permita alinear intereses entre Inversionistas Locales e Internacionales y las Empresas Mexicanas de forma ágil y oportuna por medio de modelos de negocio eficientes y adaptados a sus objetivos de financiamiento.

EQUIPO: Liderado por profesionales con amplia experiencia en el sector financiero y regulatorio  mexicano, con más de 80 años de experiencia conjunta.

CULTURA: Enfocada a la creación de valor, al crecimiento y a la implementación de soluciones innovadoras que alineen intereses entre inversionistas y acreedores.

ESTRATEGIA: Facilitar y agilizar los procesos administrativos, regulatorios, normativos, operativos y de inversión para financiar empresas mexicanas.

VALOR AGREGADO: ID se enfoca totalmente en el seguimiento de las operaciones y del cumplimiento regulatorio, lo que permite al inversionista enforcarse exclusivamente en la realización de inversiones.

COMPROMISO ASG: ID está convencido y comprometido con la incorporación de principios ASG en sus transacciones, así como en su operación del día a día, implementando las mejores prácticas corporativas.

Name: SOFIPROS
Description:
La Société de Financement des Professionnels de Santé (SOFIPROS) accompagne les professionnels libéraux de santé et les structures sanitaires ou médico-sociales dans la réalisation de leur projet de financement.

Un véritable gain de temps et d'économies pour le porteur de projet qui bénéficie de l'expertise de la SOFIPROS :

Créée par d’anciens professionnels de santé et de la finance, la SOFIPROS mutualise les compétences pour vous offrir un accompagnement complet et personnalisé de votre projet d'investissement.

Au-delà d'une économie de temps et d'énergie qui offre à nos bénéficiaires de pouvoir rester pleinement disponibles pour le cœur de leur activité, la solution SOFIPROS permet de limiter très sensiblement les coûts liés au crédit.

Notre process allie efficacité et promptitude en invitant une dizaine d’établissements bancaires :
 - À répondre sous un délai contraint.
 - À formuler une seule et unique proposition commerciale complète, sous le principe d’enchères à l’aveugle : chaque établissement est ainsi incité à se montrer d'emblée le plus compétitif possible, vous garantissant d'obtenir la meilleure solution du marché.

Par ailleurs, la SOFIPROS recourt à une assurance emprunteur déléguée permettant de diviser là aussi fortement le coût généralement associé, à garanties comparables.

La SOFIPROS, référence sur le marché du financement de la santé, est en outre libre et objective au regard des critères de l’ORIAS: elle ne perçoit aucun commissionnement de la part des banques et assurances.

En somme, seul l’intérêt supérieur de nos clients compte pour la préconisation d'une solution de financement plutôt qu'une autre.

Description:
TThe BBY Capital Group assists our clients with various forms of business financing, consulting, and ERC. Our core business is ERC and business financing. 

Right now our focus is on ERC Filing, ERC Buyouts, ERC 2nd Opinions, AND ERC A/R Factoring. 

We can beat any valid ERC offer!

ERC Filing: We've partnered with a prominent CPA firm that will maximize your claim for every possible dollar. We include audit insurance as part of our offering. It takes about 2 weeks to complete the entire file process. No Minimum Employee Count. Fees are 5-10%

ERC 2nd Opinion: Already get ERC money? OR told you don't qualify? In both cases, we can take another look, for free, and possibly get you money you thought was otherwise unavailable. We have the most comprehensive 2nd opinion process on the market that will be sure to put every possible penny back in your pocket. Our CPA has been doing ERC since it's inception in 2020 and is very knowledgeable about the specific allowances other CPA's might not be aware of. Fees are 5-10% 

ERC Buyouts: Already filed for ERC? Don't want to wait for the IRS? Once the IRS accepts your claim, we will buyout any IRS approved claim in about 10 days. Fees are 8-18%.

If you want to combine more than one of our services together, ask us about our bundled fee packages. 

ERC Firm A/R Factor: Are you an ERC firm that's been building a huge pipeline and are now tired of waiting to see cash? We work directly with a hedge fund who will buyout your ERC Accounts Receivable pipeline. Cash is immediately ready for deployment. Rates will be close to prime as this is a top 5 bank. $50M Minimum - will look at smaller cases. 

We help entrepreneurs by building them a customized funding plan for their business needs. While everyone has a different situation, we help with Equipment Financing, Invoice Factoring, MCA’s, Lines of Credit, Working Capital, and some Tax Advantages. We complement our financial offerings by consulting on personal and corporate credit.

La solución se enfoca en pagos transfronterizos B2B y P2P, especialmente para importadores, exportadores y usuarios que necesitan enviar o recibir dinero desde el exterior. Name: Cathcart Capital Consulting
Description:
Are you Finding it difficult to acquire more flexibility in repayment options to accommodate your business's cash flow needs?

Have you tried to obtain a loan with a less-than-perfect credit score, only to be turned away?

It's not your fault – most people have no idea how to tap into the power of Private Business Lending. You might even be a skeptic!

There is hope because flexible funding options are available to help you succeed.

Over the years, I have listened to business owners and investors throughout the funding process and realized there are three main challenges business owners, and investors have when seeking funding from the institutional funding method:

1. Many lenders have strict requirements that can be difficult for small businesses to meet, making it challenging to secure funding.

2. The extensive paperwork and documentation required can be overwhelming, leading to significant delays and frustration for applicants.

3. Traditional funding sources often impose higher interest rates, increasing the overall cost of borrowing and impacting the business’s financial health.


To tackle these challenges, we've streamlined the application into an easy one-page format, provide ‘same-day funding’ to respect your time, and work to secure a favorable loan rate even if your credit isn’t perfect.

How have we helped business owners overcome these challenges?:
One of our clients, a paving company in Pennsylvania, used the funds to secure new contracts that facilitated their expansion into emerging markets. 

Another client, a janitorial company in Texas, used the funds to expand on state contracts and into new territories.

And, yet another client, a children’s daycare in Utah, used rental income to buy a commercial building. Although we declined a traditional mortgage due to poor credit, we secured funding through a working capital loan.

If you want to see similar results, DM me (direct message) here on LinkedIn, and let’s chat : )

Name: IvyWild Lending
Description:
Buying a home or investing in real estate should be an exciting step toward your future—not a stressful maze of complicated mortgage options and confusing financial jargon. But for many, that’s exactly how it feels.

Whether you’re a first-time homebuyer wondering where to start, a real estate investor seeking smart financing, or someone simply trying to understand what loan options make sense for you, we know how overwhelming the process can be. You’ve got big goals and deserve guidance that’s clear, personalized, and focused on your success—not a one-size-fits-all approach.

We’re Here to Change That.
At Ivywild Lending, we believe mortgages aren’t just loans—they’re tools to help you build a better life. We’re not here to push products or overwhelm you with unnecessary details. Instead, we focus on educating you and customizing solutions to match your unique goals and lifestyle.

We take the time to truly understand where you’re coming from and where you want to go. With our tailored lending solutions, you’ll feel confident and empowered every step of the way. We offer:

-Personalized mortgage strategies designed to fit your life and financial goals.

-Clear, no-fluff guidance so you can make informed decisions.

-Expert advice with a down-to-earth approach—because mortgages don’t have to be complicated.

We’re your partners in making homeownership (and beyond) possible—whether it’s getting the keys to your first home, financing your next investment, or simply exploring options that can help you move forward. We’ll meet you where you are and help you get where you want to be.

Ready to take the next step? Let’s talk.

Name: b12 Consultoría Hipotecaria
Description:
¿Qué ofrecemos?
1-Asesoramiento profesional: Proporcionamos asesoría especializada y conocimientos expertos en el ámbito hipotecario.
2- Personalización: Adatamos nuestras recomendaciones a las circunstancias únicas del cliente, considerando sus metas financieras y situación personal.
3-Ahorro de tiempo: Facilitamos el proceso, ahorrando tiempo al cliente al encargarnos del estudio, trámites y negociaciones con las entidades bancarias.
4-Transparencia: Comunicación clara y transparente durante todo el proceso, explicando todos los términos y condiciones de manera comprensible.
5-Respaldo legal y Normativo: Garantizamos en cumplimiento de tdas las normas y requisitos legales.
6- Negociación ventajosa: Utilizamos nuestras habilidades de negociación para obtener condiciones favorables en tipos de interés y otros términos financieros haciéndote así ahorrar una cantidad de dinero importante a lo largo de toda la vida del préstamo.
7-Acompañamiento continuo: Estaremos contigo en cada etapa del proceso, ofreciendo apoyo y respuesta a tus dudas.

Con la combinación de todos estos servicios buscamos simplificar el proceso hipotecario para el cliente, ofreciéndole tranquilidad y sobre todo confianza, en una de las decisiones financieras más importantes de tu vida.

Nos dirigimos principalmente a personas individuales o familias que buscan adquirir una vivienda y requieren de asesoramiento especializados en el proceso hipotecario.

Description:
Running a business is difficult. It is no secret that most business fail within the first 5 years of opening. Why? There are many reasons, and they all come back to funding.

Where do you turn? To whom do you go?

Going to the bank yore are most familiar with can often be a nightmare. They ask for extensive credit and financial documentation, BOTH business and personal. The bank will go through your entire background financial and otherwise. And their approval process can take from a long time to an EXCEEDINGLY long time or not at all. 

Even if you get approved it can take days to get the funds in your account. After waiting for 3 months.

Often your application not approved. The bank offers no explanations, no solutions, or next steps. They do not do anything to keep helping you move your business forward. They almost seem as though they do not want your business. They only want to talk to you when you have money to give them, not the other way around.

This is why Ram Capital Inc is here. We want to help you cut through the red tape to get the equipment loan, business loan or line of credit that you need. And if we you do not get approved, we will collaborate with you to determine what steps will get you approved. And we will be there to help you through those each one of those steps.

Obtaining small business financing can be confusing, frustrating and daunting. Do not let it be. Contact us today.

 𝗦𝗼𝗹𝘂𝗰𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲𝘀 𝗘𝗺𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗲𝘀: Apoyo a organizaciones a retener talento y fortalecer su equipo con beneficios en seguros médicos y financieros que cuidan tanto a sus empleados como a sus resultados.

Mortgage Process

In the United States mortgage loans are issued by both banks and non-bank loan companies. These companies make money primarily by charging the consumer a rate of interest on the total outstanding amount of the loan. They also charge application fees that can range from a few hundred dollars to several thousand. Finally, a lender may require a borrower to pay points before issuing a mortgage. A point is equal to 1% of the total loan amount.

Name: Divitae
Description:
VENTA DE TU EMPRESA
La venta de tu empresa es una de las decisiones más cruciales que tomarás en tu vida. Mereces contar con lo mejor!

La venta de tu empresa es una de las transacciones más significativas de tu vida. Por eso, mereces contar con el mejor asesoramiento posible.
Si estás considerando vender tu compañía o buscando información para llevar a cabo una venta exitosa, es crucial entender que necesitas un proceso integral y multidisciplinario para buscar compradores que asegure las mejores condiciones para ti.

En este tipo de procesos, el enfoque abarca más que simplemente obtener el mejor precio en la venta de empresas. Hay una serie de variables igualmente cruciales que requieren gestión y negociación, incluyendo:

- Vendor due
- Términos de pago
- Minimización de impuestos
- Acuerdos de no competencia
- Contratos con la Alta Dirección
- Reducción de riesgos y responsabilidades
- Plan de integración que considere el futuro de los empleados después de la venta de tu compañía.

Inquietudes relacionadas con la venta de tu negocio:

 ¿Cuál es la valoración máxima de mi empresa y cómo puedo alcanzarla?

 ¿Es este el momento oportuno para vender mi empresa con éxito asegurado?

 ¿Cuáles son las opciones disponibles para los accionistas para cumplir con nuestros objetivos?

 ¿Cómo puedo presentar mi empresa de manera más atractiva a los inversores potenciales?

 ¿Qué inversores tienen el mayor potencial de pago y mayor interés en mi empresa?

¿Cómo puedo mitigar los riesgos asociados con los procesos de venta de empresas, como 
filtraciones o dedicación excesiva?

 ¿Qué otros términos además del precio debo negociar? ¿Tendré que asumir responsabilidades adicionales? ¿Cómo puedo reducirlas?

Name: Zentrum für Immobilien und Finanzen
Description:
Das Zentrum für Immobilien und Finanzen deckt folgende Themengebiete ab.

- Mitarbeiterbindung und Personalkostensenkung -
Durch den Einsatz von Benefits haben kleine und mittelständische Unternehmen die Möglichkeit ihre Personalkosten bis zu 10% zu senken. Zudem erleichtert eine attraktive Ausgestaltung die Mitarbeiter-Suche und erhöht die Mitarbeiter-Bindung bei der bestehenden Belegschaft.

- Gewerbe-Finanzierungslösungen -
Wir unterstützen kleine und mittelständische Unternehmen bei der Suche nach der passenden Finanzierungslösung und schreiben diese auch in der Folgen am Markt aus. Hierunter fallen Themen wie Mietkauf, Leasing, Factoring, Einkaufsfinanzierung, Lagerfinanzierung, Sale-and-Lease-back, Finanzierung von Gewerbeobjekten etc.

- Immobilien-Finanzierung -
Historisch kommen wir aus der Immobilien-Finanzierung für Privat-Haushalte. Dieses Thema bilden wir auch nach wie vor ab, wobei unser Fokus vor allem auf den Kapitalanleger-Finanzierungen liegt. Gerade auch "mit in der Schweiz lebenden Deutschen", die am Standort Deutschland Immobilien erwerben wollen, haben wir viele Erfahrungswerte. Zudem begleiten wir auch Sonderprojekte, wie bpsw. Tiny-Houses, Tiny-House-Wohnparks, möblierte Vermietungen etc.. Hier ist Übergang zur Gewerbe-Finanzierung häufig fließend.

Description:
Courtier prêt professionnel. Mood Courtier Crédit est une agence de courtage spécialisée en crédits et prêts professionnels pour les entreprises. Notre rôle est de vous accompagner dans vos projets afin de vous dénicher les meilleurs taux de crédit et les meilleurs financements auprès des établissements financiers.

Notre cabinet de courtage, courtier prêt professionnel, jouera les intermédiaires entre les banques et votre société pour vous trouver un prêt avantageux, en prenant en compte vos limites et opportunités.

Les services d’un courtier spécialisé en crédits professionnels peuvent vous permettre : l’accès à des conditions de financement avantageuses pour financer vos projets pro, des taux négociés au meilleur prix, prétendre à un rachat de crédit, renégocier son taux de crédit immobilier, constituer un plan de financement garanti par un établissement bancaire, souscrire un regroupement de crédits pour alléger vos remboursements, définir votre capacité d’emprunt auprès des banques, renégocier son taux de prêt contracté, prétendre aux meilleures offres de crédit du marché ou encore renégocier des échéances en cours. Si vous visez à investir dans un bien immobilier à usage professionnel, obtenez les meilleures offres en vous faisant accompagner d’un courtier spécialisé en prêts immobiliers comme Mood Courtier Crédit.

Loïc Evrard, fondateur de Mood Finance Conseil et de Mood Courtier Crédit, est un véritable expert sur le marché. Ce dernier a travaillé par le passé avec de grands Groupes de l’industrie française en tant que directeur financier, et a rapporté plusieurs centaines de millions d’euros auprès d’établissements financiers. C’est ce qui a poussé ce professionnel à sa lancer dans sa propre activité de courtage.

Description:
At Lending By Nikki, we bring over 18 years of dedicated experience in the mortgage industry to every client we serve. Types of mortgages
Conventional loan – Best for borrowers with a good credit score
Jumbo loan – Best for borrowers with excellent credit looking to buy an expensive home
Government-insured loan – Best for borrowers who have lower credit scores and minimal cash for a down payment
Fixed-rate mortgage – Best for borrowers who’d prefer a predictable, set monthly payment for the duration of the loan
Adjustable-rate mortgage – Best for borrowers who aren’t planning to stay in the home for an extended period, would prefer lower payments in the short-term and are comfortable with possibly having to pay more in the future

Name: Maxspurt Lending
Description:
Maxspurt Lending is a mortgage broker in Dallas,Tx. 

There are three parties involve in the transaction, buyer, seller & Realtor and we all want to know how much buyer can afford. 

After all, if buyer can’t afford to buy it, buyer be wasting everyone’s time, including his own. Aside from affordability concerns, buyer may find other issues that disqualify him from obtaining a mortgage. 

And these issues aren’t always obvious, especially to the first-time home buyer who has never obtained a home loan before. You might think you’re good to go, but because of the nuanced and ever-changing mortgage landscape, it’s better to know for sure.
We  gathers information from buyer about his income, debts and assets and reviews your credit report, then makes a preliminary financial determination about how much house you may be able to afford.  This information can be acquired by completing the standard loan application, or by completing a quick phone questionnaire, with much less detailed information. We encourage you to complete the standard loan application form initially as you will be required to complete it before we can fully process your loan. You will also need to sign an authorization to allow us to access your credit report. If you qualify, a Pre-qualification letter is issued showing the amount of loan you qualify for.The Pre-qualification is only as good as the information that you give, and is subject to our verification of that information during processing of your application.

En Visión Urbano, nos especializamos en el desarrollo de negocios internacionales, conectando oportunidades de crecimiento entre China y Argentina. Asesoría en Inversiones Internacionales: Facilitamos la inversión de capital chino en proyectos argentinos con alto potencial de retorno, garantizando una integración efectiva y beneficiosa.
Servicios de Seguros y Administración: Implementamos soluciones para proteger y maximizar los activos empresariales en ambos países.
Nuestro Enfoque:
Combinamos una profunda comprensión de los mercados chino y argentino con conocimientos financieros especializados. Nuestro enfoque se basa en la colaboración, la innovación y la creación de valor a largo plazo, facilitando conexiones estratégicas y promoviendo el crecimiento sostenible en ambos países.

Si estás interesado en explorar oportunidades de inversión, optimizar tus estrategias de negocio o expandir tu presencia en el mercado argentino, Visión Urbana está aquí para brindarte el apoyo y la experiencia necesarios.

Para aquellos que buscan una hipoteca para comprar una vivienda, SMARTCREDIT PLUS se dedica a encontrar la opción que mejor se adecue a sus necesidades, con los mejores tipos de interés y condiciones posibles. Si ya tiene una hipoteca, nuestro servicio le mantendrá informado sobre el momento ideal para cambiarla, aprovechando cualquier bajada en los tipos de interés o modificaciones en las condiciones, como el cambio de una hipoteca fija a variable en los tipos mixtos. Además, le proporcionaremos asesoramiento continuo sobre cuándo le conviene mantener los seguros con su banco debido a su vinculación con la hipoteca, o si es más beneficioso contratar esos seguros en una entidad diferente. Nuestro objetivo es que siempre tome decisiones informadas que optimicen su economía personal.

4. Ofertas en Servicios del Hogar
En nuestra búsqueda constante de ahorros para nuestros clientes, le presentamos las mejores ofertas en servicios esenciales para el hogar, incluyendo:

- Energía: Encuentre tarifas eléctricas y de gas más económicas y adaptadas a su consumo.

LOAN PROGRAMS

DSCR Purchase Loans – Acquire cash-flowing rental properties
DSCR Refinance Loans – Rate-and-term or cash-out options
Short-Term Rental (STR) Financing – Airbnb/VRBO property loans
Foreign National Investment Loans – No SSN or U.S. credit required
Fix & Flip Loans – Fast funding for value-add investors
Commercial Real Estate Loans – Income-producing asset financing

WHO WE SERVE
First-time investors buying their first rental property, self-employed entrepreneurs, high-net-worth individuals, foreign nationals, and experienced portfolio builders. Whether you're buying your first rental or scaling to 10+ properties, we structure deals that traditional banks won't touch. If you're documentation-constrained but not creditworthy-constrained, we're your solution.
OUR ADVANTAGE
90+ banking relationships for specialized Non-QM programs. Rates starting at 5.99%. Nationwide coverage with tri-state (NY/NJ/CT) specialization. Education-first approach—we want you to understand why a loan works, not just that it works.
READY TO SCALE?
Visit DSCRPro.com or connect

Name: BUHOCAMBIOSOFICIAL
Description:
Política de Protección de Datos y Responsabilidad – @buhocambiosoficial
En @buhocambiosoficial , nos comprometemos a proteger la privacidad y seguridad de los datos de nuestros clientes. Al utilizar nuestros servicios, usted acepta los siguientes términos y condiciones relacionados con la protección de datos y la responsabilidad en el envío de dinero.

 Protección de Datos Personales
La información proporcionada por los clientes (nombre, documento de identidad, datos bancarios, entre otros) será utilizada exclusivamente para procesar transferencias y cumplir con normativas legales.
No compartimos, vendemos ni divulgamos los datos de nuestros clientes a terceros, salvo requerimiento de autoridades competentes.
Implementamos medidas de seguridad para proteger la información contra accesos no autorizados, fraudes o pérdidas.
 Responsabilidad del Cliente en el Envío de Dinero
El cliente es responsable de proporcionar los datos correctos (nombre, cuenta bancaria, monto, etc.). Cualquier error en la información enviada puede afectar la transacción, y @buhocambiosoficial no asume responsabilidad por ello .
Una vez realizada la transferencia, los fondos no pueden ser revertidos ni modificados .
Los clientes deben asegurarse de que los fondos enviados provienen de fuentes legítimas. @buhocambiosoficial se reserva el derecho de rechazar transacciones sospechosas o que incumplan normativas legales .
Al solicitar una transacción, el cliente declara que comprende y acepta estas condiciones , eximiendo a @buhocambiosoficial de cualquier responsabilidad ajena a la prestación del servicio de transferencia.

𝐕𝐨𝐨𝐫 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐮𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐧:
•	Hypotheken: Of je nu jouw droomhuis wilt kopen, jouw huidige hypotheek wilt herzien of advies nodig heeft over hypothecaire opties, wij zijn er om jou te begeleiden.
•	Verzekeringen: Bescherm jezelf, jouw gezin en jouw bezittingen met onze uitgebreide verzekeringsmogelijkheden. Wij vinden de juiste dekking die bij jouw situatie past.
•	Sparen: Met onze spaarplannen helpen we u om jouw financiële doelen te bereiken. Ontdek de beste spaaropties die bij jouw plannen en behoeften passen.
•	Kredieten: Soms heb je extra financiële ruimte nodig. Wij bieden diverse kredietoplossingen aan die aansluiten bij jouw persoonlijke situatie.

𝐕𝐨𝐨𝐫 𝐁𝐞𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐣𝐯𝐞𝐧:
•	Bedrijfsverzekeringen: Bescherm jouw bedrijf tegen risico's met onze op maat gemaakte bedrijfsverzekeringen. Wij zorgen voor een passende dekking, zodat je met een gerust hart kunt ondernemen.
•	Bedrijfshypotheken: Als ondernemer begrijpen wij de specifieke behoeften van jouw bedrijf. Onze bedrijfshypotheek oplossingen zijn op jouw zakelijke doelen afgestemd.
•	Bedrijfskrediet: Wij ondersteunen jouw bedrijfsgroei met flexibele kredietmogelijkheden. Ontdek hoe wij jouw zakelijke ambities kunnen verwezenlijken.

Met drie vestigingen in Den Haag, Voorburg en Leiden zijn wij lokaal aanwezig en goed bereikbaar. Ons hoofdkantoor is gevestigd in Den Haag, waar ons team van deskundige adviseurs voor jou klaarstaat.

Bij DOEN Adviesgroep geloven we in het leveren van hoogwaardige dienstverlening en het opbouwen van duurzame relaties met onze klanten.

On se plie en quatre (ou en cinq, si besoin) pour vous dégoter le saint Graal financier adapté à votre profil. Et avant de conclure quoi que ce soit, on fait nos devoirs préliminaires avec sérieux.

On s'occupe de tout, des paperasses aux démarches bancaires, le tout orchestré par un interlocuteur unique. Oui, oui, c'est bien ça, pas de labyrinthe téléphonique chez nous !

Parce qu'on sait que le meilleur crédit, c'est un peu comme un costume de super-héros : il doit vous aller comme un gant. Ensemble, trouvons la solution qui vous fera dire : "CREDIT VITAL, mon vrai super allié financier !"

Description:
Quel est le rôle d’un courtier financier indépendant ?

Un courtier financier indépendant est un expert qui vous conseille et vous accompagne pour atteindre vos objectifs financiers.
 
Pour développer votre patrimoine personnel ou professionnel, plusieurs sujets sont à prendre en compte dans leurs complémentarités : financement, épargne, assurance et prévoyance, tout est lié. 

Que vous soyez particulier ou professionnel, nous analysons votre situation et étudions, en toute impartialité, les offres du marché afin de vous proposer la solution la plus adaptée pour atteindre votre objectif.

Notre indépendance vis-à-vis des banques et des compagnies d’assurance nous permet de vous offrir un conseil impartial, entièrement centré sur vos intérêts et vos besoins spécifiques.

Basés au cœur des 2 Savoie, nous intervenons également dans les départements limitrophes et sur l'ensemble de l’Arc alpin. De Lyon à Grenoble, en passant par Chambéry, Aix-les-Bains et Annecy, jusqu’au Léman et au Pays de Gex, nous vous accompagnons avec une expertise pointue des spécificités locales.

Why Choose Private Lend REI for Private Money Lending?

* Investor-Focused: Your success is our priority. We act as your trusted advisor, advocating on your behalf from start to close. We work for YOU—not the lender.

* Competitive Edge: We guarantee to beat any credible offer you receive.

* Fast and Flexible: Simplified qualifications and a typical closing time of under 30 days, much faster than traditional loans.

* Diverse Loan Types: We offer Fix & Flip, Bridge, Refinance, Cash Out, Construction, and Commercial Loans, tailored to meet your specific investment needs.

* Higher Loan Amounts: Ideal for experienced investors with active, high-value projects.

* Tailored Rates: Competitive rates based on the strength of your deal’s financials.

* Your Credit Rating: Used in part to calculate the rates, but not to decide whether you qualify. The loan approval is based primarily on the financials of the deal.

* Exclusive Focus: We lend exclusively on non-owner-occupied properties, ensuring you're getting the specialized attention you need to thrive in the real estate investment market.

Got a deal in the works? Let us provide a fresh perspective. You’ve got little to lose—and a lot to gain—by exploring what Private Lend REI can offer.

We also partner with other professionals who provide deal-related leads.

Name: Cash to Start or Grow Your Business
Hablemos de Finanzas
Description:
Fórmula de 3 pasos para salir de la deuda
1-Haga la lista de sus deudas
En primer lugar, saber cuánto está en deuda de tarjeta de crédito. Muchos titulares de tarjetas de crédito se sorprenden cuando conocen la deuda total de la tarjeta de crédito que deben pagarse. Ellos inconscientemente se alejan de compilar esta lista. Pero tendrás que conocer tus deudas totales. Escriba el nombre del prestamista, la fecha de la deuda, el monto total a pagar y la tasa de interés. Organizar la lista de acuerdo a la tasa de interés. Las deudas de tarjetas de crédito con tasas de interés más altas deben mostrarse primero.

Tarjeta de crédito de 2 pagos con la tasa de interés más alta
Ahora comienza a pagar primero la tarjeta de crédito de tasa más alta. Siempre pague más de la cantidad mínima. Si eres adicto a las trampas de pago mínimo, nunca estarás fuera de deudas por toda tu vida. Los bancos han dispuesto una trampa de deuda mínima de tal manera que un préstamo podría demorar muchos años en pagarse si usted solo paga en cantidades mínimas. Siempre paga más de lo mínimo. Estos pequeños pagos extra le ahorrarán literalmente mil dólares.

3-Start Frugal Living
Mientras esté endeudado, comience a vivir frugalmente. Cortar sus tarjetas de crédito. Pida a las empresas que no le ofrezcan más tarjetas de crédito. Deseche la compra impulsiva. Trate de ahorrar cada centavo si es posible. Estos pocos dólares agregados a los montos de pago mínimos crearán un efecto de bola de nieve hacia los pagos de deuda de su tarjeta de crédito.

Name: CREDITARIA MASTER 8
Description:
¿Quiénes somos?

En CREDITARIA MASTER 8 somos intermediarios financieros especializados en créditos PyME e hipotecarios. 

Ayudamos a empresarios, a profesionales, y a emprendedores a obtener el financiamiento más adecuado para sus proyectos, negocios o patrimonio.

Simplificamos el proceso: Comparamos entre las principales instituciones bancarias y financieras del país, presentamos las mejores condiciones y acompañamos a nuestros clientes en todo el proceso con transparencia y profesionalismo.

Soluciones de financiamiento:

Crédito PyME: 

Capital de trabajo 
Liquidez inmediata
Adquisición de activo fijo 
Sustitución y consolidación de pasivos
Factoraje (a clientes y a proveedores)
Arrendamiento (puro, financiero y sale & leaseback).

Crédito Hipotecario: 

Adquisición de vivienda, nueva o usada
Liquidez con garantía hipotecaria
Sustitución o mejora de hipoteca
Terreno + construcción

¿Cómo lo hacemos?

Trabajamos bajo un proceso en línea, seguro y confidencial, porque entendemos que el tiempo es un recurso valioso y que la información sensible requiere máxima protección.

Con presencia en la Ciudad de México y en Quintana Roo, en CREDITARIA MASTER 8 ponemos a tu alcance experiencia, respaldo institucional y la certeza de tomar decisiones financieras informadas.

¿Por qué elegirnos?

 Porque somos Creditaria, el máster bróker de crédito más importante del país, con acceso a la más amplia red nacional de bancos e instituciones financieras.

 Porque en Creditaria tenemos capacitación constante, y siempre estamos actualizados sobre las condiciones de cada institución.

 Porque ofrecemos asesoría profesional sin costo, con un proceso en línea, seguro y confidencial.

NO TIENES POR QUÉ SABER DE CRÉDITOS, SOLO TIENES QUE SABER A QUIÉN LLAMAR.

 Solicita una asesoría personalizada y comencemos con tu crédito hoy mismo.

Name: Vibe Home Loans
Description:
Who are we? We're mortgage brokers. We'll help navigate you through the competitive and ever-changing mortgage landscape to find the right loan for you. We'll go into bat and negotiate on your behalf, and we'll make the process as simple as possible for you, geared up to deliver fast results. We'll help you avoid the pitfalls, and we'll find loan features to suit your personal circumstances.

Why use us as a mortgage broker when looking for finance?

A mortgage broker is someone who shops around for the home loan that's right for you. Whether you're in the market for your first home or building a portfolio of investment properties, we have access to hundreds of loans from a host of Australia's leading lenders.

We do the hard work for you.

We make sure you get the right home loan for your circumstances and will manage the process from start to finish.

When should you see us and what can you expect?

You can see us at any stage in your financial journey. You might still be saving for your first home, wishing to use the equity in your current one, or wondering if you're still getting the right deal with your existing lender. You can make an obligation-free appointment with us at a time and place that suits you.

We will ask about your financial circumstances and objectives to find out what's important to you in a home loan. For example, flexibility might be important because you plan to start a family or you may want ready access to equity for a rental property or renovations. Whatever your plans, we will research the market and recommend the right home loan to suit your needs. We always look for the right loan for you, not the lender.

Name: MİSYON KREDİ DANIŞMANLIK
Description:
Misyon Kredi Danışmanlık Finansal Çözüm Ortağınız

Misyon Kredi Danışmanlık, bireylerin ve işletmelerin finansal süreçlerini daha etkin yönetmeleri için danışmanlık hizmeti sunar. Mali durumunu iyileştirmek isteyenlere, doğru stratejilerle rehberlik ederek finansal hedeflerine ulaşmalarına yardımcı olur.

Hizmetlerimiz
Finansal Analiz: Mevcut mali durumunuzu değerlendirir, ihtiyaçlarınıza özel çözümler öneririz.

Borç Yönetimi Danışmanlığı: Borçlarınızı yönetmek ve ödeme planlarınızı düzenlemek için stratejiler geliştiririz.

Gelir ve Gider Planlaması: Gelirlerinizi ve harcamalarınızı dengede tutmanıza yardımcı olacak yöntemler sunarız.

Ticari ve Bireysel Danışmanlık: Bireyler ve işletmeler için özelleştirilmiş finansal çözümler sunarız.

Kredi Notu Düşük Olanlar İçin Destek

Kredi notunun düşük olması, finansal süreçlerde zorluklara yol açabilir. Ancak düzenli ödeme alışkanlıkları kazanarak ve planlı bir mali yapı oluşturarak bu durum düzeltilebilir. Misyon Kredi Danışmanlık olarak, her adımda yanınızda yer alıyor ve size uygun çözümler sunuyoruz.

Nasıl Çalışıyoruz?

Her müşterinin finansal geçmişini ve mevcut durumunu detaylı analiz ederiz. Bu doğrultuda kişiye özel stratejiler geliştirir, doğru planlamalarla süreci en etkin şekilde yönetiriz. Müşterilerimizin mali dengelerini sağlamaları için her aşamada rehberlik eder ve finansal hedeflerine ulaşmalarına yardımcı oluruz.

Şeffaf ve Güvenilir Hizmet

Misyon Kredi Danışmanlık, şeffaflık ve güven ilkeleri doğrultusunda çalışır. Her aşamada müşterilerine açık ve anlaşılır bilgi sunar. Amacımız, finansal sürecinizi doğru yönetmenize destek olmak ve uzun vadede istikrarlı bir mali yapı kurmanıza yardımcı olmaktır.
